title: Corning: More Measures To Expect Based On Its Management Framework
text: Declining free cash flow co-exists with improved margin from management's actions. Measures to cushion lower net sales' impact have been taken, and are expected to continue. Historical data suggested its lower cash flow could be bottoming out.

title: Corning Announces Quarterly Dividend
text: CORNING, N.Y., June 21, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Corning Incorporated's (NYSE: GLW) Board of Directors today declared a quarterly dividend of $0.28 per share. The dividend will be payable on Sept. 28, 2023, to shareholders of record on Aug. 31, 2023.

title: Corning Appoints Thomas D. French to Its Board of Directors
text: CORNING, N.Y., June 20, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Corning Incorporated's (NYSE: GLW) Board of Directors today announced that Thomas D. French, former senior partner and current senior partner emeritus with McKinsey & Company, has been appointed to Corning's Board of Directors, effective June 20, 2023.

title: Corning (GLW) Surges 5.9%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
text: Corning (GLW) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.

title: Markets Ended the Day Lower, but Up for the Week on Inflation, Fed Optimism
text: Markets closed lower for the day, higher for the week on lower inflation, expectations the Fed may be pause or halt interest rate hikes.

title: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Say Buy These 3 Tech Stocks With Over 3% Dividend Yields - Adtran (NASDAQ:ADTN), Corning (NYSE:GLW)
text: During times of turbulence and uncertainty in the markets, many investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks. These are often companies that have high free cash flows and reward shareholders with a high dividend payout.

title: Markets End the Week in the Green in Anticipation the Fed Will Pause Rate Hikes
text: Markets posted a winning day on Friday, June 9, 2023, to top off a winning week on optimism the Fed may pause its interest rate hike cycle next week.

title: Corning Stock Rallies After Upgrade. What's Behind the Brighter Outlook.
text: Morgan Stanley turned bullish on the specialty glass maker, as it anticipates better times ahead.

title: Corning (GLW) Expands Vial Manufacturing With New India Unit
text: SGD Pharma is the latest to join a growing network of leading pharma manufacturers adopting Corning's (GLW) cutting-edge coating technology.

title: Why Corning Stock Is A Strong Buy
text: Corning stock offers a solid 3.5% dividend yield and above 20% upside potential, outweighing headwinds and risks. The company is expected to see sequential revenue growth in the upcoming earnings, marking a positive pivot. Risks to consider include technological risks, supply-chain risks, foreign exchange risks, and geopolitical risks.

title: Corning and SGD Pharma announce joint venture to open new glass tubing facility and expand access to Corning® Velocity® Vial technology in India
text: The collaboration will enable faster, more efficient delivery of vital medicines and help support India's growing pharmaceutical industry The collaboration will enable faster, more efficient delivery of vital medicines and help support India's growing pharmaceutical industry
